/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/StealthActionGame.dir/debug_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StealthActionGame.dir/SoundEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StealthActionGame.dir/entities.cpp.o -o StealthActionGame  /usr/local/lib/libsfml-graphics-s.a /usr/local/lib/libsfml-audio-s.a /usr/local/lib/libsfml-window-s.a /usr/local/lib/libsfml-system-s.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrandr.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXcursor.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXrender.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXfixes.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXi.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libudev.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so -lrt /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvorbisfile.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvorbisenc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvorbis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libogg.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libFLAC.so -ldl
